13289400.title: Lewis Miller Cottage

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: Historic house in New York, United States

13289400.description: Historic house in New York, United States
13289400.extract: The Lewis Miller Cottage is a historic house at Whitfield and Vincent Avenues, on the grounds of the Chautauqua Institution in Chautauqua, New York. Built in 1875, it was the residence of Lewis Miller, co-founder of the Chautauqua movement. It was designated a National Historic Landmark on December 21, 1965.
